metadata.description: Claude Code plugins maintained by kokuyouwind

plugins.name: rbs-goose
plugins.description: Setup rbs type definitions for steep and automatically fix type errors

plugins.name: dev-guidelines-git-workflow
plugins.description: Git repository workflow guidelines including branch management, testing practices (TDD), Docker environment handling, and PR workflow

plugins.name: dev-guidelines-debugging
plugins.description: Systematic debugging methodology for thorough root cause analysis with evidence-based investigation

plugins.name: dev-guidelines-design
plugins.description: Structured evaluation of design options with trade-off analysis for architecture and implementation decisions

plugins.name: dev-guidelines-pr-format
plugins.description: PR description format and workflow requirements for GitHub pull requests

plugins.name: issue-resolver
plugins.description: GitHub Issue解決プロセスを自動化するスキル。Issue種別を判定し、種別ごとに適切な解決手順を提供します

plugins.name: code-like-prompt
plugins.description: Collection of commands that execute code-like prompts demonstrating programming concepts including logic programming and backtracking

plugins.name: zenn-writer
plugins.description: Zenn記事執筆を支援するプラグイン。インタビュー形式で内容を深掘りし、完全な草稿を自動生成します。
